title: 菊花賞の後に・大きな変化

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho, the final race of the Classic
Triple Crown, is over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mihono Bourbon seizes a stunning
first-place victory, she feels deep frustration that
she is unable to obtain the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to have her run in the spring Tenno Sho
in order to complete her second goal of "inspiring
courage" in others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She suddenly remembers the way Rice Shower
looked during the race and gets an unsettled
feeling in her chest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the same feeling she gets when she hears talk
of Tokai Teio. It seems she's gained a particular
awareness of other runners in a way she's never
had before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regrettably, Mihono Bourbon is unable to obtain
the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to have her run in the spring Tenno Sho
in order to complete her second goal of "inspiring
courage" in others.

text_block_list.text:
She suddenly remembers the way Rice Shower

text_block_list.name: Monologue

It's the same feeling she gets when she hears talk
